title: Game UI supports dynamic team sizes from agent-registry
description: Add missing rose color, defensive seat assignment, verify game renders with 2-15 agents

scope.in: Add rose to COLOR_NAME_TO_HEX, defensive seatId fallback, verify variable agent counts
scope.out: Do not modify tilemap or desk layout. Seat ASSIGNMENT adapts, not desk positions.

dod.criterion: Quinn renders with rose color, not gray
Game renders without errors with 2-15 agents

tasks.title: Add rose color to COLOR_NAME_TO_HEX mapping

dod.criterion: COLOR_NAME_TO_HEX contains 'rose' entry with pink/rose hex value
Quinn renders with rose color instead of gray fallback

tasks.title: Defensive seat assignment for agents without seatId

dod.criterion: Agent without seatId does not crash the game
Unseated agents assigned to available seats or gracefully excluded
No two agents occupy the same seat

tasks.title: Verify game renders correctly with 2-15 agents

dod.criterion: Game renders without JS errors with 2 agents
Game renders without JS errors with 15 agents
TeamPanel displays correct agent count matching registry
Agents beyond seat capacity handled gracefully
